issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost specification, not a separate Trigger effect. The activation cost (trash this Character + 1 Baroque Works Character) must be encoded in the first effect.

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. This is trashing Characters on board, not from hand. Should be 'KO' or similar board-based removal. Also, the cost requires trashing THIS card (self) PLUS another Baroque Works character—this is a dual cost structure.

Activation cost structure is malformed. The effect must express: [COST: trash self + trash 1 Baroque Works Character on board] → [ACTION: add 1 DON from deck and set active]. Current DSL does not properly model the dual-target cost.
Second effect with 'Trigger' and 'PlaySelf' is incorrect and unnecessary. The card is trashed as part of the cost, not played. This effect should be removed entirely.
'GiveDon' is incorrect action type. Should be 'AttachDon' to set a DON card as active (attached to leader or field state). Also, the action should search/retrieve from DON deck, not give.
